purpose: Canonical file list for KJELDGAARD Claude projects. The loader fetches this manifest first, then fetches every file listed under 'tier_1_required'. Verification is arithmetic: count fetched files, compare to manifest count. Mismatch = re-fetch.

tier_1_required.description: Fetched unconditionally at conversation start. Do not skip any file under any circumstances.

files.purpose: Complete operating system: copywriting rules, advertorial format, workflows, Danish language rules
Resolves tensions: compliance > forbidden claims > brand voice > VoC > DR structure > polish
Approved efficacy claims + clinical study references
Complete sales argument, positioning, USPs, unique mechanism framing
Forbidden words, phrases, claims — hard ban list

tier_2_ads_scripts.description: Fetch when writing ads, scripts, advertorials, or testimonial video content

tier_3_quality_scoring.description: Fetch when scoring, reviewing, or rewriting copy

tier_4_language_reference.description: Fetch for Danish translation or voice-of-customer work

files.note: Large file — only fetch when deep theory reference is needed

tier_5_testimonial_tools.description: Fetch for testimonial processing and video testimonial work

task_templates.description: Reusable task specifications. Reference by filename in chat to invoke.
